title: TailorOutputV1
description: Structured resume tailoring artifact for regeneration, validation, and cache keys.

tailorOutputVersion.description: Breaking changes increment the JSON Schema file version (tailor-output-v2.json).

summary.description: Tailored professional summary reflecting the JD.

experienceSelections.description: Ordered bullet IDs from the master resume to include for this JD.

skillsOrdering.description: Ordered skill IDs from the parsed master resume Skills section.

omissions.description: Bullet or skill IDs explicitly omitted versus the master source.

rationaleHash.description: Stable opaque fingerprint for caching (e.g. hash of rationale + JD slice); Epic C assigns semantics.
